name: Fish Tacos
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ cups shredded Monterey Jack cheese
pico de gallo (tomatoes, onions, jalapenos, lime, cilantro, salt, pepper)
Fresh, mild fish (trout, flounder, mahi-mahi, catfish, etc.), either sautéed, fried or grilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the fresh fish into a food processor and process until smooth.
2. Lay out corn tortillas on a clean surface.
3. Spread the blended mixture evenly onto each tortilla.
4. Add sliced red cabbage, cilantro leaves, pico de gallo, and portions of the cooked or prepared fish.
5. Roll up each tortilla tightly to form a taco.
6. Serve immediately.
